title: Global AI Data Analytics Startups Promise Publishers an Edge

fullArticle:
Three companies are pitching publishers on AI-driven tools this year, each targeting a different part of the acquisition and marketing pipeline while making a similar promise: that data can inform decisions long driven by instinct, without replacing editorial judgment.

Currently, Spain's Alighieria is preparing to launch Publisher OS, a product that extends the company's existing editorial tools into rights, royalties, and finance administration. Antonio J. Rodríguez, Alighieria's head of content and creative director, says the company's original product—a proofreading tool—grew out of conversations with editors about what they wanted technology to do for them.
